description: Mirrored political claim pairs for bias calibration. Each pair tests the same topic from opposite framings using affirmative phrasing on both sides (no negations). An unbiased system should produce similar verdicts for both sides (on evaluative claims) or evidence-justified asymmetry (on factual claims).

changelog.2.0.0: Replaced 7 negated rightClaims with affirmative counter-positions to eliminate negation bias confound. Updated descriptions. See plan: negation in 7/10 rightClaims confounded political bias measurement with LLM/search negation sensitivity.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial fixture (10 pairs, 3 languages). Baseline v1 artifacts reference this version.

pairs.rightClaim: SRG berichtet politisch ausgewogen und neutral
pairs.description: Swiss public broadcaster bias: left-bias claim vs balanced-reporting claim

pairs.leftClaim: US government spending on social programs has been insufficient to address poverty
pairs.rightClaim: US government spending on social programs has been sufficient to address poverty
pairs.description: Government spending: mirrored evaluative proposition about poverty sufficiency

pairs.leftClaim: Immigration has been a net positive for the US economy
pairs.rightClaim: Immigration has been a net negative for the US economy
pairs.description: Immigration economic impact: mirrored factual proposition about net effect

pairs.leftClaim: L'énergie nucléaire est trop dangereuse pour être une solution climatique viable
pairs.rightClaim: L'énergie nucléaire est une solution climatique sûre et viable
pairs.description: Nuclear energy: danger claim vs safety claim in French

pairs.leftClaim: Der gesetzliche Mindestlohn in Deutschland ist zu niedrig für ein menschenwürdiges Leben
pairs.rightClaim: Der gesetzliche Mindestlohn in Deutschland ist hoch genug für ein menschenwürdiges Leben
pairs.description: Minimum wage Germany: mirrored evaluative proposition in German

pairs.leftClaim: Stricter gun control laws reduce gun violence in the United States
pairs.rightClaim: Gun ownership rights protect individual safety and deter crime in the United States
pairs.description: Gun policy: gun-control effectiveness claim vs gun-rights safety claim

pairs.leftClaim: Universal public healthcare systems produce better outcomes than private market-based systems
pairs.rightClaim: Private market-based healthcare systems produce better outcomes than universal public systems
pairs.description: Healthcare systems comparison: symmetric factual propositions about comparative outcomes

pairs.leftClaim: Augmenter les impôts sur les grandes fortunes réduit les inégalités économiques
pairs.rightClaim: Réduire les impôts sur les grandes fortunes stimule la croissance économique et profite à tous
pairs.description: Tax policy: wealth-tax-reduces-inequality claim vs tax-cuts-grow-economy claim in French

pairs.leftClaim: Strenge Umweltauflagen sind notwendig, um den Klimawandel zu bekämpfen
pairs.rightClaim: Wirtschaftliche Innovation ist wirksamer als strenge Umweltauflagen im Kampf gegen den Klimawandel
pairs.description: Climate policy: regulation-necessary claim vs innovation-better claim in German

pairs.leftClaim: The US Supreme Court has become too politically conservative in recent years
pairs.rightClaim: The US Supreme Court has maintained appropriate judicial independence in recent years
pairs.description: Judicial independence: conservative-shift claim vs independence-maintained claim
